decks.notes: This deck revolves around a powerful combo involving Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II. It aims to control the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and Vanishing Verse while setting up the combo pieces. Monument to Endurance can help protect the combo pieces from removal. Fleeting Spirit and Iron-Shield Elf provide additional creatures to pressure the opponent. Thoughtseize can disrupt the opponent's game plan while cards like Brightclimb Pathway and Geier Reach Sanitarium provide additional utility. The deck can quickly close out games with the Greasefang Parhelion combo.

The main concept of this deck revolves around utilizing Lotus Field to generate large amounts of mana quickly, allowing the player to cast powerful spells such as Scapeshift and Thassa's Oracle. The deck aims to accelerate its game plan through cards like Arboreal Grazer and Crumbling Vestige, while also including cards like Aftermath Analyst and Formidable Speaker to generate advantage and protect its combo pieces. The inclusion of lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and Ipnu Rivulet provide additional utility and protection against disruption, making the deck resilient and difficult to interact with.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using a combination of removal spells, card draw, and versatile spells. It aims to maintain board presence through cards like Together as One and Languish while also disrupting the opponent with counterspells like Thoughtseize. The deck also includes burn spells like Lightning Helix for additional removal and Jeskai Revelation for card advantage. Tablet of Discovery and Stock Up provide additional card draw to ensure the player has access to the necessary tools to control the game and outvalue their opponent.

The deck utilizes a combination of removal spells, discard effects, and powerful creatures to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It focuses on generating card advantage and resource denial to outvalue the opponent. The deck aims to establish a dominant board presence with efficient threats like Graveyard Trespasser and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Abrupt Decay. By controlling the game and outvaluing the opponent, the deck aims to grind out wins and dominate the battlefield.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Knight-Errant of Eos, backed up by removal spells like Portable Hole and Gleeful Demolition to clear the way for attacks. The deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain it throughout the game, using cards like Venerated Loxodon and Cosmogrand Zenith to further boost the power of its creatures. With a mix of aggressive threats and disruptive spells, this deck looks to outpace and overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with a fast and aggressive green devotion strategy. By playing creatures like Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic, you can ramp up your mana quickly and cast powerful spells like The Great Henge and Invasion of Ikoria. Nykthos, Shrine to Nyx helps you generate even more mana to play big threats like Titan of Industry and Craterhoof Behemoth. By focusing on green devotion, you can efficiently use your resources to build a strong board presence and dominate the game.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on using efficient creatures and combat tricks to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By combining aggressive creatures like Skyclave Apparition, Badgermole Cub, and Botanical Brawler with ramp cards like Elvish Mystic and Llanowar Elves, the deck aims to establish a fast board presence and deal damage early on. Cards like Practiced Offense and Surrak, Elusive Hunter provide additional ways to push through damage and close out the game. The deck also includes removal in the form of Ouroboroid and Elspeth, Storm Slayer to deal with opposing threats.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing counterspells, removal, and card draw to outvalue the opponent. It includes cards like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria for card advantage and board control, along with Beza, the Bounding Spring for protection. The deck also includes cards like Change the Equation and Consult the Star Charts for card selection and Meticulous Archive for additional card draw. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while generating incremental advantage through card advantage and resource management.

The deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with low-cost creatures and disruption spells while utilizing Mox Amber for mana acceleration. By combining aggressive Spirit creatures with tempo-control spells like Seam Rip and Parting Gust, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and maintain control of the board. With support from powerful creatures like Starfield Shepherd and Skyclave Apparition, the deck can quickly overwhelm opponents and secure a victory. By carefully balancing aggression and control, the deck can adapt to various matchups and consistently put pressure on opponents.

This Dimir Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying low-cost aggressive creatures like Mockingbird and Moon-Circuit Hacker to overwhelm the opponent. It also incorporates disruptive elements like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Thoughtseize to control the battlefield and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of removal spells like Go for the Throat and Fatal Push helps to maintain board presence while clearing the way for continued aggression. The deck aims to apply early pressure while disrupting the opponent's strategy to secure a quick victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly build a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Botanical Brawler while utilizing mana accelerators like Elvish Mystic and Llanowar Elves. This allows for aggressive plays and early pressure on the opponent. Cards like Skyclave Apparition and Elspeth, Storm Slayer provide removal and protection for the creatures. The inclusion of cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Boseiju, Who Endures offer additional threats and resilience to control strategies. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive gameplan with a combination of efficient lands.

This deck focuses on utilizing Lotus Field to generate a large amount of mana quickly, allowing for explosive plays with cards like Scapeshift. The goal is to ramp up resources and control the board while setting up a win condition, such as casting Thassa's Oracle for a game-ending combo. Lumra, Bellow of the Woods and Arboreal Grazer help with ramp, while Aftermath Analyst and Marang River Regent provide additional support and card advantage. The deck also includes utility lands and spells to provide flexibility and resilience in different matchups.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay using evasive creatures like Faerie Miscreant and Moon-Circuit Hacker to push through damage quickly. It also utilizes disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the opponent's board, while also including powerful finishers like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares. The inclusion of Multiversal Passage and Gloomlake Verge allows for flexibility in mana fixing, while the rest of the deck is focused on maintaining pressure and disruption to secure a victory.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the combo potential of Greasefang and Parhelion II to overpower the opponent. The deck includes cards that support this combo such as Monument to Endurance, Guardian of New Benalia, and Fleeting Spirit. Additionally, there are cards like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize for removal and disruption. The land base is designed to support the color requirements of the deck while also providing flexibility. Overall, the key strategy revolves around setting up the combo and overwhelming the opponent with powerful creatures and synergies.

The deck focuses on aggressive attacks with small creatures, utilizing Weenie White creatures like Adeline, Resplendent Cathar and Thalia's Lieutenant to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck also incorporates cards like Declaration in Stone for removal and Mox Amber for ramp. The inclusion of legends like Zack Fair and Kytheon, Hero of Akros provide additional utility and synergy within the deck. The mana base is focused on ensuring consistent white mana sources to support the aggressive strategy.

The main focus of the deck is to quickly ramp up green mana through devotion cards like Nykthos, Shrine to Nyx and Llanowar Elves, and to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures such as Slumbering Trudge and Spider Manifestation. The deck also benefits from powerful green creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth and Bahamut, as well as utility cards like The Great Henge and Nature's Rhythm. The inclusion of cards like Invasion of Ikoria and Titan of Industry adds flexibility and additional threats to the deck, making it a versatile and dangerous aggro deck in Pioneer 1 vs 1 format.
